path: Problem: Return a value from a 2D table using multiple row criteria and multiple column header criteria (two-way lookup with composite keys)
Action: Use INDEX with two MATCH functions where each MATCH finds the position of a row/column by multiplying boolean arrays for multiple criteria (array MATCH)
Observation: Multiple criteria can be combined into a single MATCH by multiplying TRUE/FALSE arrays and matching the result to 1; INDEX then uses the resulting row_num and column_num
